name: The Dragon
archetype_description:
The keeper of the universe's secrets, which will be revealed only to those who can speak your language.

If a person cannot make an effort to understand you, it's his problem, not yours. The task of the Alchemist is to carry the Knowledge and follow it perfectly.
portrait_description:
You know what you don't know. An eternal student. From the very birth, you see the world as a whole and as a network of interconnections. You love and try to contribute to what is happening, from which sometimes suffer, because energy can only flow to where it is welcomed. When Alchemist, out of kindness, intrudes without asking - as a result, this often turns out a proper mess for him. He might even end up being the one to blame for the failure, when he attempts to saave the situation.

Your vision of the world is a treasure that needs to be protected, not wasted, so it has a guard: your peculiar language. Only those who are able to make an effort to understand you can receive the benefits that you posess.

The social circle of an Alchemist is often narrow due to the fact that one is often misunderstood and having accepted that, resorts to being a resentful outsider. This happens because they do not often value their vision, because things they say are so obvious for them. The lesson for an Alchemist is not to turn away from the ignorant, but to find a way to perfectly manifest your Knowledge - then people will come to him for advice themselves. That is why it is important for an Alchemist to learn how to dose information, to see how it is 'taken in', whether something that has been said has an effect.

Negative manifestations of Alchemists: they are difficult to communicate, looking for free ears to speak out, obsessive advisers, manipulating their superiority; immoral behavior, resentment at the whole world for misunderstanding.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Alchemist:
The keeper of the universe's secrets, peculiar in communication, inclined to overload others with information, and caring for those who are able to understand him. A good advisor if requested.

When making decisions, it is important for you to focus on the overall organicity with your picture of the universe and not make dangerous compromises with your conscience.

name: The Wind
archetype_description:
You are your inner child, cheerful, brave, cruel, sincere, cunning, and enthusiastic. It has the power to fill everything you do with some feeling.

Sincerity in everything, in every moment. Laughter is the Fool's weapon to fight inner demons. Don't forget to breathe!
portrait_description:
The bearer of the quality that every person needs to develop in himself: an example or a menacing warning to others about what to do and not to do.
The Fool is an inner child, with his seriousness and emotionality, courage and sincerity.

The Fool or a blessed one is a person at court who can say what even the Lord cannot afford to say. Among the Fools there are especially many singers. An inspirational speaker who lives by bringing the Knowledge to the masses. The most important thing is the emotional and sensory contribution to each action, smoothness and fluidity. Breathing must be observed to control the mind. Fun and laughter help, breathing practices are especially good.

Negative manifestations of the Fools: powerful internal monologue, cruelty, and uncontrollable emotions. Don't believe everything you think!
type_description:
Acting like a typical Fool:
Think less, laugh more! You know how to speak simply and clearly about complex things, an inspired speaker who needs to make sure that he is not carried away. Thoughts have the ability to get ahead of emotions, then you start to 'boil up' and fuss. It is important not to forget to breathe.

When making a decision, take a deep breath and ask yourself: what does my heart tell me?

name: The Night
archetype_description:
You are the universe! Living proof that everyone lives in their own fairy tale and chooses what it should be: scary or happy.

Dreaming is just as important as keeping in touch with reality. Your intuition will always tell you where to look for treasures.
portrait_description:
You live in a unique world that you have invented for yourself. The key to success for you is to skillfully keep a balance between fantasy and reality, Maya in which each of us lives. It is important to dream, that is, to clearly articulate your desires. If the Genie figured this out, then his intuition will tell you where to look for what you need.

You came to this world in order to understand how consciousness works and to produce a deep healing of your soul, that is, to negotiate with the Genie who hears any of his thoughts and says: your wish is my command!
This is the power of Abundance, personifying the abyss of blue. There is a talent for producing, creating unusual and thoughtful images.

Negative manifestations of a Genie: incompetence, empty fantasies, delusion, as well as a tendency to form deep subconscious attitudes that can be both productive and destructive.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Genie:
From the outside, it seems that you live in the world of your fantasies, but you know how to focus on the subject, developing competence. And as soon as it is developed, the implementation of the plan becomes a matter of technique, therefore, first of all, it is important to understand what you really want.

Critical points in decision making: honesty with oneself, awareness of one's desires and confidence that delusion is excluded.

name: The Seed
archetype_description:
The archetype of a 'conscious person', whose attention is primarily occupied by the irreversibility of actions and their consequences. Consistency and prudence are your strengths.

'He's so impressionable!' - this is what they say about those who think about the consequences before doing something.
portrait_description:
The one who looks at an acorn and sees an oak tree. The owner of such a valuable quality as awareness. That is, before you do something, you think about what consequences it may lead to. Sometimes even too much.
Impressive, observant, tends to exaggerate the observed: one act of a person, you draw an image of someone who always behaves like this.
It reads in your sense of humor. You live in a world of grotesque, cartoon characters, being, like Alice in Wonderland, the only normal person of all. And the choice is yours: be on the sidelines or lead.
The irreversibility of actions is what attracts his attention and what should be agreed with.

Negative manifestations of the Seers: indecision, excessive impressionability, lack of constancy and irresponsibility.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Seer:
Prudent, down to earth, constant and responsible, to the point of tediousness. Impressive and prone to fear of making a mistake.

When making a decision, you should ask yourself the question: Am I ready to act like this this all the time?

name: The Serpent
archetype_description:
A reasonable cynic and healthy egoist.
Neither happy nor sad.
You are the sober person at the party who takes everyone home because you are caring and don't experience the intoxication like the rest.
portrait_description:
Traveler in the worlds of spirits. The reptilian part of the brain is concious - the ability to extremely calmly and pragmatically assess the situation from the point of view that we are all separate living organisms and the task of each of us is to survive.
You will always note an act in your own interests on the part of others and you yourself know how to take care.

You do feel the intoxicants influence on your body, often even more, than other people, nevertheless, there's a part of the consciousness is always sober and evaluates the situation up to the loss of consciousness.
]The Shaman's body dictates and directs. He listens to his instincts. Sexual attraction is a reason to get acquainted, an unpleasant smell from a person is a reason not to interact with him.

Negative manifestations of Shamans: susceptibility to the influence of emotions, hysteria, obsession with the physical body and sensations, self-destructive sacrifice or, conversely, selfishness and a consumer attitude towards others.
type_description:
Acting like a Shaman:
Neither happy nor sad, neither good nor evil. Mysterious and languid, driven by instinct, smell and touch. A pragmatic altruist who is inspired by selfless concern for others and sees it as a way of taking care of himself.

When making decisions, it is important both to take into account your own interests, in order no not to act to your detriment, and to take into account the benefit of the common good.

name: The World-Brigde
archetype_description:
You are your breadth of knowledge. You know everyone, you've tried everything, and then you have gone further, and now you are here.

A sweet fellow, able to find common ground with anyone. You are the same person who is approached even for the contacts of a ballroom dance teacher, even a good acupuncturist.
portrait_description:
The bearer of the quality that every person needs to develop in himself: an example or a menacing warning to others about what to do and not to do.
The strength of the Hierophant is a personality that is constantly changing and renewing, including depending on who you interact with.

You have the ability to accept and understand the position of the interlocutor and already from his point of view convey your unshakable position. Inside each of us lives an infinitely many-sided diamond of the soul. Due to the fact that it is infinitely multifaceted, it has such a quality as triviality. In this way, he is the same inside everyone. From this comes the realization of the equality of all before all.

From time to time, you feel the need to change your environment and/or field of activity, you are a bridge connecting people from different worlds: through you, people meet and communicate much more closely than with you.
You are unlikely to be able to clearly answer the question: 'What are you?' You are anyone, you can become anything, like a blank sheet of paper. You are lucky due to the presence of a wide network of contacts, you are provided with various favorable opportunities that are important not to miss.

Negative manifestations of Hierophants: conditioning with the external and identifying oneself with it, stereotyped thinking, all kinds of attachments and dependencies, passivity, lack of initiative, depression.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Hierophant:
You have a wide network of connections in various spheres of life, because you managed to play a role in many places and managed to leave in time to keep these connections.
You are able to laugh at yourself if you do not take everything personally. You will find a common language with anyone, as long as you communicate with people on an equal footing.

When making a decision, you should ask yourself the question: Is it dictated by the expectations of others or by myself? Am I being guided by outdated perception of self?

name: The Hand
archetype_description:
You are the Resurrected. One who is ought to heal himself to be able to save others.

A breaker man that can be either 100% on or 100% off. You tend to define the relationships you are in, even if you're not playing the leading role in it.
portrait_description:
Once stuck in a swamp of laziness and weakness of character, you are destined to pull yourself out of there 'by the hair'. Thus, build a respectful and clear relationship with yourself, in the 'risen and resurrected' mode. To continue to be in this mode and to build relationships with attention and input.
This is a great contribution that can bring a lot of benefits to someone who is able to support interaction in this format. If a person is not able to respond with such input to the Healer, then you should not waste time on this relationship.

One of the toughest archetypes, distinguished by a 'medical' sense of humor, a distinguished appearance. Often, they know better than professional doctors what is wrong with health and how to treat it.

Negative manifestations of the Healers: spinelessness, a lazy slob, sissy, or a cruel, immoral dictator who is unable to build productive relationships out of mutual respect.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Healer:
Initially, you know how to heal yourself, for this you need to show appropriate rigor, respect and discipline.
You also treat others, that is, tactfully in your own way.

When making decisions, the key point for you is the ethical aspect.

name: The Star
archetype_description:
You're an artist: either do things beautifully or don't do them at all.

'Everything should be perfect in a person: your face, your clothes, your soul, and thoughts', as once said by Russian classic Anotn Chekhov about people like him. For the Artist, beauty and organicity come first.
portrait_description:
The key aspect of your strength is aesthetics. It is necessary to find manifestations of beauty in everything to which you devote yourself. If it doesn’t work out, then it’s simply not your means of expressing or searching for beauty. What you do doesn't necessarily needs to be pretty, but it has to objectify your vision of laws of nature.

It is important that manifestations of beauty have an impact on others. Harmony, naturalness and manifestation of the divine nature is the key principle of the Artist. This is a poet in love, singing about his adoration of life, a hedonist, an example of how to live. True art must transcend any prejudice. That what makes the Artist prophet for humanity.

Negative manifestations of the Artists: narcissistic egoists, victims of their desires.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Artist:
Everything in a person should be beautiful: his words, his thoughts, and deeds. Looking for ways to express your sense of beauty in this world and impress others.

When making a judgement, you should ask yourself the question: is it organic?

name: The Moon
archetype_description:
The more you love a person, the more unpleasantries he will hear in his address.

You are kind and caring, but love for your neighbor is not only pleasantness and sighs in the moonlight. Sometimes loving a person makes you hurt him, doesn't it?
portrait_description:
You bring the power of forgiveness and grounding. Better than others, you track the delusions of the mind and, thus, it is easier for you to get rid of its negative influence, to recognize your own and others' inner demons.

To show love is, among other things, to say to a person's face the truth, about which the rest will remain silent. To lead another through the pain he is unable to inflict on himself. This ability of yours constantly attracts 'all sorts of weirdos' - those who need to open their eyes to the truth. And then the choice is yours.

The ability to see the situation already makes you an active participant in it, therefore, inaction is also a choice that will entail consequences. It is important to be able to convey information to a person in a suitable form.

Negative manifestations of the Exorcists: cruel manipulations of people through their weaknesses, immoderation in vice, a shattered psyche as a result of the inability to cope with their passions.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Exorcist:
You know your 'dark' side and help others see and accept theirs. You give out mental slaps to those who you are not indifferent to. Accept the weakness and sinfulness of the flesh and learn to be at peace with it.

A critical moment in decision making: the ability to see the ugly truth, to show forgiveness of vices and acceptance of the imperfections of human nature.

name: The Dog
archetype_description:
You are the manifestation of the Truth. Nobody can force you to do what you don't want to. Even himself.

Being faithful to your peers: you immediately see those to whom you forgive any mistake, and those who are strangers to you. You are who you are, and only on your own initiative can you change.
portrait_description:
The bearer of the quality that every person needs to develop in himself: an example or a menacing warning to others about what to do and not to do.
For the Witcher, this means to remain in your Truth - not betraying yourself and those whom you recognized as your own ones.

The power of the Truth, Christ's love and unconditional acceptance. The Truth is something that not everyone can see, but when faced with it, no one can deny.
You see people as they are, and they, in turn, show you their true face.

If you have found your own in life, then you know how to love and put in. Great capacity for work, dedication to work and love. You instinctively feel your people - those whom you can love and forgive, no matter what, and strangers, whom you simply do not perceive by default. You are able to change and act only at will. The internal state greatly affects the external appearance, you have the ability to reincarnate.

Negative manifestations of the Witches and Witchers: a tendency to take on someone else's responsibility and not live your life, prefer to stay good instead of giving a person care in the form that he needs. Lack of self-control, in particular in food behaviour. In women, love for the world can take on a special drama. Some obvious things have to be realized with great difficulty.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Witcher:
You can see the Truth in yourself and in a person, you can’t stand falsehood, you divide the world into friends you forgive and strangers you don't tolerate from the fist sight and being a bitch to them.
You are true to your own, you can’t stand strangers in your spirit.
You strongly change outwardly depending on your condition.
You have a great resource of working capacity when you are in the right place, at the same time you show total slovenliness when you are not busy with your own business.

When making decisions, you need to focus on the truth: is it a true contribution or a false one? Is this the need of my soul or of the one whom I am going to help?

name: The Monkey
archetype_description:
Master of the game of life. Your secret is simple: everything is possible. The question is, whether it's necessary or not?

Rules exist for those who find it necessary to follow them.

The Mage is a master of breaking boundaries. It's pointless to forbid you anything.
portrait_description:
The master of your reality. You are playful and truly free. For you, rules and conventions are both destructive and necessary. They must be consciously so ypu don't get yourself locked in a cage. By your very existence you prove that there are no rules and everything is possible.

Youre playful in your own way when you interact. This is your way to share your vision. You communicate with everyone, as if with a lover, flirting in your own way. Some magicians are boorishly straightforward, some are flowery. Everyone has his own game in which he finds his creative power.
In a relationship, it's often complicated, but, on the other hand, this contains a great prospect for growth and success.

Negative manifestations of the Magicians: The Magues sometimes get lost in the illusions and games that they start, so it is important to remain objective. The worst thing for the Magician is stiffness, thoughtless acceptance of the rules (when the cage wins).
type_description:
Acting like a typical Mage:
You play by your own rules, you have your own penetrating style of communication, which brings liberation to those who can appreciate it.
You have a tendency to 'be carried away with your playing', losing contact with reality.

A critical moment in making decisions based on conventions and rules to which you agree or disagree.

name: The Human
archetype_description:
What can be told about you in a nutshell? You've been through a lot! Your experience is your wealth and strength.

A master at recruiting life experiences and persuasive speeches. You can’t even go to the nearest bakery without an adventure to happen.
portrait_description:
You have rich life experience and are ready to share it. If you accept your experience as a resource, you gain influence. The main thing is openness to incoming experience and the ability not to dwell on failures and painful experiences.
If you are talking about something, then it should be based on your experience. Otherwise, this is a wake-up call.
You are a potentially great storyteller and natural teacher. You get wiser and better with age.

Negative manifestations of the Wise Men: the role of a martyr or a victim, get stuck in the same stories and thereby show others how not to. They are able to see the weak points of a person, skillful manipulators.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Wise Man:
You are more experienced than others, simply because it happens more often to get into all sorts of trouble. If you learn from experience, you can become an influential person.
You have a sense of what experience needs to be shared.

When you make a choice, you open yourself to the influence of experience coming to or from you.
When making a decision, ask yourself the question: is this a necessary experience to go through?

name: The Skywalker
archetype_description:
You're always not like other people! Apparently, this is because they have a lot to learn from you.

You can be truly objective in your judgements. You should not take anyone's word for it, because for the most part no one understands anything. Understand everything on your own and explain the situation to others.
portrait_description:
A curious researcher, capable of an objective assessment, so you should not take anyone's word for it. Most people think in terms of accepted patterns, and therefore, they are deeply deluded about the real picture of the world. To avoid confusion, you have to figure things out on your own, looking for gaps in the belief systems that guide the masses. Norm is a crutch you don't need.

The Pastor encourages others to come to their senses, look ahead and see the frightening consequences that their unconscious behavior can lead to. This is how the prophecy is formed. This is why the Pastor has such a temper - to call others to come to their senses.

Negative manifestations of the Pastor: your weak point is prejudice and stereotyped thinking. If you do not form your own norms, then you become a gray mouse or a narrow-minded sheep.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Pastor:
Fighting the stupidity and narrow-mindedness in yourself and those around you. You make others come to their senses, you look for a natural and organic way.

Decisions must be independent: you should not take a word or be guided by generally accepted concepts, but only taking into account the popular opinion, try to see the development prospects.

name: The Wizard
archetype_description:
You are a 'charm'; You are able to capture the attention of a person to help him look at the situation from the side.

Got stuck in the present moment or out of time, because of this, almost never change your appearance over the course of life. You know how to be extremely charming due to the self-consciousness given at birth.
portrait_description:
The bearer of the quality that every person needs to develop in himself: an example or a menacing warning to others about what to do and not to do.
For the Sorcerer, this is the ability to reflect - to observe and evaluate what is happening from the outside.

As one Wizard said: 'I was born an adult.' You are detached, but always present in the moment. You have a kind of relationship with time. You know how to deftly capture the attention of the interlocutor, involving him or her here and now. Sensitive and receptive.

Negative manifestations of the Sorcerers: they may be intolerant to people, because they suffer greatly from someone else's unconsciousness; they are often unsociable and gloomy.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Sorcerer:

You have a high level of self-awareness when you are down-to-earth. He lives in the eternal moment of the present, in which time either freezes or rushes at a frantic speed.
He can skillfully and deftly control the attention of both his own and those around him.

When making a decision, you should look at the situation from the outside and ask yourself the question: How mature will this decision be?

name: The Eagle
archetype_description:
It's interesting to watch people from a bird's eye view, isn't it? You do not need to explain how you are different from others - you need to learn to see what we are all the same in.

The ability to see the big picture is far from all that is required of a visionary. Being a diplomat, maintaining respectful relationships and appreciating everyone around is what makes your scope real.
portrait_description:
The owner of the mind, capable of embracing the world. You see what is happening from a bird's eye view, a person who likes to watch people - the role they choose and the game they play. The archetype of a politician or terrorist who has the ability to create large-scale projects and involve large groups of people in them. Being a creative person, you like to be in the thick of things, making an object of art out of yourself and your life. You are quite dangerous.

Negative manifestations of the Storytellers: They may be cruel, giving in to a sense of superiority, often poor contact with the physical body: they do not pay attention to hunger, fatigue or stress, eat anything.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Storyteller:
You think and act on a grand scale, you have organizational skills and strategic thinking, you are dangerous.

A critical moment in decision making: you have the ability to see a real perspective, that is, to combine large-scale and down-to-earth vision.

name: The Warrior
archetype_description:
If you start arguing with someone, it does not mean that the person is wrong. If a person is wrong, then you will also get him thrashed.

All the information that you come across, you are sure to dispute.

Including this one.
portrait_description:
A fighter for justice, a bearer of the punishing, warming and nourishing Power of fire.
When you realize that you are right and the other is wrong, you fall into a state of fearlessness, that is, you get the opportunity to punish the violator of the law of common sense without any consequences for yourself. Whatever atrocities he commits, bearing retribution, you get away with it. The main thing is to fight for a just cause.
In life, courage, activity, warmth of relationships are important for you.

Negative manifestations of the Inquisitors: eternal dissatisfaction with the world around, unrestrained criticism, empty rebellion, restlessness, and vindictiveness.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Inquisitor:
Your way: put everything you come across through a critical filter, so you can appear to be a perpetually disgruntled wrangler. But this is your way, which makes it possible not only to save yourself, but also to lead.

In questioning everything, one must question the very necessity of the doubt as well.

name: The Earth
archetype_description:
A person without a primary occupation.
You can go into the thicket for mushrooms, wander there for several hours, and then at the right moment go where you need to.
The more complex and confusing what you do, the more interesting it is!

You must have several things at the same time. Do it all at once, but don't quit.
portrait_description:
You carry the power of evolution: the principle of the development of everything that exists as a single whole, that is, synchronous multidirectional development.
This is the ability to control many processes at the same time and intuitively feel at what point each of them requires attention so that they do not fade away. You are predisposed to working with complex systems and theories, a born tactician who is entrusted with the management of an entire army from different types of troops and units. The owner of a rare appearance. An example of how diverse nature is in its manifestations.

Negative manifestations of the Intuitives: they may be excessively windy, inconstant, not finishing things to the end.
type_description:
Acting like a typical the Intuit:
Spontaneity and lightness are your strong points; you feel comfortable in intricate and complex systems, you feel when one or another process from the field that you manage requires attention.

Decision question: What does my intuition tell me in the present moment?

name: The Mirror
archetype_description:
You are a truth-bearer. You need to learn not to hold your tongue, but to reflect and organize what not everyone can see.

Even when it is better to remain silent, express your position like a mirror that cannot but reflect.
portrait_description:
The bearer of the quality that every person needs to develop in himself: an example or a menacing warning to others about what to do and not to do.
For the Judge, this is truthfulness, uncompromisingness, certainty and depth.

Truth-bearer, showoff and swearer. Categorical in judgments, you know how to draw a clear line between 'black' and 'white'. When you have a certain judgment, it is extremely difficult to keep your mouth shut, which is why you often suffer.
You have the potential for deep vision and the ability to foresee the future. You are predisposed to introspection and often succeed in this. Before revealing their depth, they go through an identity crisis, because they do not find it in their reflections of the world around them.

Negative manifestations of Judges: superficiality, idle talk, disorganization, quarrelsomeness, deceit.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Judge:
You do not wait for an invitation in order to state your point of view. You are categorical, truthful, even to the detriment of yourself. You have an analytical mindset, a penchant for studying systems and classifications, as well as visionary abilities.

When making a decision, you should make sure that you are making it in accordance with your inner truth and have deeply delved into the subject.

name: The Storm
archetype_description:
You are a motor man. It doesn't matter whether there is any result, the main thing is that the movement does not stop!

After conducting a military campaign, the Battlemaster realizes that he did everything fundamentally wrong and will act differently next time. It makes you unpredictable, even to yourself.

'The only thing that is constant in life is change' - this is about you.
portrait_description:
You know how to quickly make things happen around you. You masterfully launch processes and it is more important for you to maintain them than to cling to results. You yourself cannot predict your future actions due to the fact that each result brings you rethinking. Your goal is not a single result, but a stable flow, a gradual increase in scope. Stop means stagnation. It is important to learn to be smooth, meaningful in your processes and unwind them not in vain, but by living deeply, without being indifferent and cold.
With age, it goes from an ugly duckling to a beautiful swan.

Negative manifestations of the Battlemaster: to cling to the result and be disappointed means to become cold and hard, and the activity is meaningless.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Battlemaster:
You know how to start the flow of change and support it - you stand in the center of the funnel that you spin. Unpredictable in its manifestations and changeable. Constantly growing and reinventing yourself is your main motivation.

In decision making, the key factor is a fresh, updated look and freedom from outdated installations.

name: The Sun
archetype_description:
He is just a human being. And what is simple is not always easy.

The possessor of the power of Enlightenment and Nobility. You may not know what to do, but you always know how to behave in order to be called a Human.
portrait_description:
A person who can be trusted with power because you know what to do with it. An idealist, fighter for the Truth and Justice. You possess the universal power of light without distinctive qualities, interact with a person using his energy, highlight the potential of the interlocutor, transferring him to higher frequencies. You give an example of what you should strive for, you see the hidden potential of things. You can fall into righteous anger.

Negative manifestations of the Lord: disappointment with the imperfection of the surrounding world, considers himself a trivial person without any qualities, does not understand that he has all the qualities at once. Too high or too low self-esteem, cruelty, inhumanity.
type_description:
Acting like a typical Lord:
Like a spotlight, you highlight other people's strengths and weaknesses; you raise the frequencies of the group. An idealist, you bring love to your image of order. You are oppressed by the imperfection of the world, inclined to fall into righteous anger.

When making a decision, you should ask yourself: would that be a noble act?
